vocab.word: a picture is worth a thousand words
vocab.ipa: /ə ˈpɪktʃər ɪz wɜːθ ə ˈθaʊznd wɜːdz/
vocab.meaning: một bức ảnh có giá trị thay cho ngàn lời nói
vocab.example: I always try to capture mountain vistas because a picture is worth a thousand words when describing such beauty.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng/thưởng ngoạn cái gì đó cực đẹp
vocab.example: When you reach the cliff edge, you can truly feast your eyes on the coastal scenery while snapping a few shots.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được kỹ năng/học cách làm gì đó
vocab.example: It took me a while, but I've finally started to get the hang of taking high-quality landscape photos.
Sometimes I envision the perfect shot in my mind's eye long before I actually find the right view to photograph.

vocab.meaning: cuối cùng nhưng không kém phần quan trọng
vocab.example: I love cityscapes, nature, and last but not least, I enjoy taking pictures of the view from my own balcony.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác cực kỳ sung sướng/hạnh phúc
vocab.example: Photographing the sunrise from the peak made me feel on top of the world.

vocab.meaning: tuyệt vời, không tưởng (đến mức như ở thế giới khác)
vocab.example: The views of the northern lights were simply out of this world, so I had to keep my camera shutter clicking.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó kinh ngạc đến mức nghẹt thở
vocab.example: The panoramic view of the canyon truly took my breath away, and I wanted a photo to preserve that feeling.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn/từ đầu đến chân (dùng để nhấn mạnh bản chất)
vocab.example: I'm a nature lover through and through, which is why 90% of my camera roll is filled with forest views.

vocab.meaning: bằng mắt thường (không có thiết bị hỗ trợ)
vocab.example: The distant islands were barely visible with the naked eye, but they looked magnificent through my zoom lens.
